M-009.NAME: frontend-user
M-009.owns: login, verified registration, password recovery, verify-email activation, dashboard, config delivery, subscription management, pending trial countdown/calendar UX, referrals and settings UI with per-device config awareness

phase-23-scope.primary-behaviors: mobile navigation, VPN status, config QR/download/copy, device create/rotate/revoke, subscription renewal/payment entry
phase-23-scope.unchanged-contracts: auth, VPN, device, billing, referral API shapes remain unchanged in Phase-23 unless a separate contract update is approved

phase-28-scope.primary-behaviors: pending check-email response, no token storage before verification, verify-email success/expired/replay states, resend path, compact mobile-safe registration

phase-31-scope.primary-behaviors: owner-only MTProto proxy API binding, compact dashboard proxy card, copy/open Telegram actions, and no-secret console traces

phase-44-scope.primary-files: App.tsx, Register.tsx, Login.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx, Settings.tsx, lib/api.ts, lib/passwordPolicy.ts, scripts/phase44-auth-email-ux-smoke.mjs
phase-44-scope.primary-behaviors: compact check-email state with spam hint, no stale trial/VPN registration promise, forgot/reset password screens, duplicate-email recovery CTA, and client-side password strength hints.
phase-44-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-44 auth/email UX smoke passed.

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending-first-VPN state, server-derived remaining days/hours/minutes, compact subscription calendar, and no stale 3-day trial copy.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-45 subscription UX smoke passed.
